global.description: The ad features a dark background with bold text and abstract shapes, promoting a cashback offer.
global.main_message: Earn cashback daily with a focus on peace of mind.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract geometric shapes in varying sizes, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: additional shapes
elements.description: Smaller abstract shapes that complement the main subject, adding visual interest at the top.

elements.label: cashback message
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Earn cashback daily' in a prominent position, designed to catch the viewer's attention.

elements.label: peace of mind
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that reads 'Built for peace of mind', providing additional context.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A small button or text element that encourages user interaction, positioned centrally.

elements.label: shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Shop now', designed to stand out and prompt immediate action.

elements.label: main headline
elements.description: A large, bold headline at the bottom of the ad that reinforces the cashback message.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind

elements.label: shop now text
elements.description: A small text element that serves as a call to action, encouraging users to engage with the ad.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo at the top left corner that reads 'EarnPath', establishing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold text, cashback offer, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main headline is at the bottom, and the call to action is centrally located.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, Built for peace of mind, Shop now, EarnPath
